narrative:
Sandusky City has 15,154 registered voters, with 63.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 10.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.8 percentage points.
